visual_style.prompt_suffix: shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

synopsis: 林宇拨通苏娜电话，要求调出欧洲CBAM法案细则做新的对标报告。苏娜质疑'他不关心环保'，林宇回'但他关心利润！'

part_a.label: 上

atmosphere.overall_mood: 深夜紧急电话，振奋果断的行动力
atmosphere.lighting: 深夜室内台灯光，手机屏幕蓝光映在脸上

part_a.video_prompt: A young man urgently making a phone call late at night in his room, pacing with excitement and determination, speaking rapidly with energized conviction. He has just had a breakthrough idea and is mobilizing his team. Dynamic night scene. No subtitles. Shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field.

bgm.description: 节奏明快的钢琴与轻快弦乐，充满驱动力和紧迫感

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇迅速拿出手机，手指快速滑动找到苏娜的号码，按下拨号键。手机屏幕的蓝光映在他坚定的脸上。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 果断行动的一刻，没有丝毫犹豫
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 手机解锁声、拨号按键音
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up from slightly above of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair urgently pulling out his phone, finger swiping to dial, blue phone screen light illuminating his determined face in a dark room, warm desk lamp in background, decisive action moment, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇把手机贴到耳边，急切地喊出苏娜的名字，声音充满了兴奋的能量。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 深夜的一通电话，打破了沉寂
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up side profile of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair pressing phone to his ear, mouth open calling out urgently, energized expression, dark room with warm desk lamp light behind him, blue phone glow on his jawline, late night urgency, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇在房间里踱步，一只手拿着手机说话，另一只手在空中有力地比划，语气果断。

characters.name: 林宇
characters.action: 边踱步边打电话，手势有力

storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 踱步中的果断指令，如将军调兵遣将
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic medium shot of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair in white t-shirt pacing across a dimly lit room while talking on the phone, one hand gesturing emphatically in the air, commanding body language, warm desk lamp light casting his moving shadow on the wall, dynamic late-night scene, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇停下脚步，面朝桌上摊开的资料和童童的画，眼中闪烁兴奋的光芒，继续对电话说话。

characters.name: 林宇
characters.action: 面朝桌上资料，兴奋说话

dialogue.speaker: 林宇
dialogue.text: 给赵总做一份新的对标报告！

storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 资料与蜡笔画并置，灵感与行动交汇
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 电话中苏娜微弱的应答声
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic medium shot from slightly below of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair in white t-shirt standing by a desk covered with documents and a child's crayon drawing, phone to ear, eyes sparkling with excitement, speaking with passionate conviction, warm lamp light on his animated face, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 电话那头的画面切入（分屏暗示）：苏娜被深夜来电惊醒，坐在床边，戴着眼镜接听，表情困惑。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 深夜被唤醒，困惑中试图理解对方的兴奋
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 电话中林宇远处的声音
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a 28-year-old Chinese woman with shoulder-length black hair slightly messy from sleep, gold-rimmed glasses hastily put on, wearing a dark top, sitting on the edge of her bed answering a phone call with a confused expression, bedside lamp light, late night interruption, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇在房间里继续踱步，脸上充满了战斗的激情，手势更加有力，整个人散发着势不可挡的能量。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 一个被点燃的灵魂，在深夜的房间里发出光芒
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic medium shot slightly from below orbiting slowly around a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair in white t-shirt pacing with powerful gestures in a dimly lit room, face radiating fighting spirit and unstoppable energy, warm desk lamp light catching his dynamic movements, shadows on walls, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

part_b.label: 下

atmosphere.overall_mood: 质疑与坚定对碰，信念压倒一切
atmosphere.lighting: 林宇房间暖色台灯 vs 苏娜床头冷色灯，电话两端的光影对比

part_b.video_prompt: Split between two late-night scenes: a woman on the phone questioning a decision, and a man responding with absolute conviction about profit and carbon emissions. The man's passion and certainty overwhelm the woman's doubts. Dramatic phone conversation. No subtitles. Shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field.

bgm.description: 节奏加快的弦乐与钢琴交织，高潮前的紧张推进

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 苏娜在电话那头皱眉，语气带着质疑，一手扶着额头表示不解。床头灯映出她困惑的表情。

dialogue.speaker: 苏娜
dialogue.text: 我们还要去找他？他根本不关心环保！

storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 冷静的质疑声如一盆冷水
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 电话中略带杂音的通话质感
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a 28-year-old Chinese woman with shoulder-length black hair and gold-rimmed glasses, frowning with one hand on her forehead, speaking into phone with skepticism, bedside lamp casting cool light on her confused face, late night bedroom setting, questioning disbelief, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 切回林宇，他微微一笑，眼中闪着智慧的光芒，语气坚定而自信地回答。

dialogue.speaker: 林宇
dialogue.text: 他不关心环保，但他关心利润！

storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 一句话击穿了所有质疑，金句时刻
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 音乐在此处有力地重音一击
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up from slightly below of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair smiling with confident determination, eyes gleaming with cleverness, phone to ear, speaking a powerful line with absolute conviction, warm lamp light highlighting his face against dark background, triumphant expression, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 苏娜听到这句话微微一怔，手从额头放下，眼神变化——从质疑开始转为理解。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 思维被打通的瞬间，质疑开始融化
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a 28-year-old Chinese woman with shoulder-length black hair and gold-rimmed glasses lowering her hand from her forehead, expression shifting from skepticism to dawning understanding, eyes widening slightly, phone to ear, bedside lamp light, moment of realization, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇握着拳头，充满力量地补充最后一击——碳排放就是流失到对手那里的钱。

dialogue.speaker: 林宇
dialogue.text: 碳排放是他流失到对手那里的钱！

storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 掷地有声的论断，如同一记重锤
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic medium shot from slightly below of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair in white t-shirt clenching his fist with powerful conviction, phone in other hand, speaking a killer argument with supreme confidence, warm lamp light dramatic on his face, dynamic energy radiating from his posture, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 苏娜的表情完全转变，从困惑变为被点燃，嘴角浮起一丝笑意，开始理解林宇的策略。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 质疑者变为同盟，火花传递到了对面
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 电话中林宇自信的呼吸声
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a 28-year-old Chinese woman with shoulder-length black hair and gold-rimmed glasses, her expression transforming from doubt to a spark of understanding, a slight smile forming on her lips, eyes brightening with recognition of the brilliant strategy, bedside lamp warm light, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

storyboard_6grid.scene_description: 林宇站在窗前，远处城市夜景灯火点点，他的侧脸映着坚定的微笑。手中放下的手机屏幕还亮着通话界面。新的战役即将打响。
storyboard_6grid.atmosphere: 深夜的城市灯火如同战场上的星星——它们一直都在
storyboard_6grid.sfx: 音乐渐收为坚定的尾音、远处城市夜声
storyboard_6grid.ai_image_prompt: Cinematic medium side shot of a 30-year-old Chinese man with short curly black hair in white t-shirt standing by a window at night, city lights twinkling in the distance, a confident smile on his profile, phone lowered with call screen still glowing, silhouette against the cityscape, beginning of a new battle, hope and determination, shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field
